headline: Hospital Chains Stocks Q4 Highlights: Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) and the rest of the hospital chains stocks fared in Q4.

headline: SEM's $16.50 Take-Private Moment: Undervalued or Perfectly Timed?
summary: Select Medical jumps 8.4% on a $16.50-per-share take-private deal, but with analyst targets higher, investors may question if the timing leaves upside on the table.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Lowers its Price Target on Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS) to $229 and Maintains a Neutral Rating
summary: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 27, 2026, Cantor Fitzgerald lowered its price target on Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) to $229 from $250 and maintained a Neutral rating.
